title: Brick and Mirror
actors: Taji Ahmadi, Zackaria Hashemi, Goli Bozorgmehr
plot: Hashem (Zakariya Hashemi) is a cab driver who finds an infant child in the back seat of his cab one night after he gives a ride to a young woman. He and his girlfriend, Taji (Taji Ahmadi), try to cope with this unwanted child. Has...
